title: ctenitis marginalisora
intro: Ctenitis marginalisora, also known as the Marginal Shield Fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is native to the tropical forests of Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Ctenitis marginalisora include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. Ctenitis marginalisora can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
